'''Louix Gorman''' (born 25 April 2005) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} or {{rlp|fb}} for [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].<ref>[https://globalsportsarchive.com/people/rugby/louix-gorman/7866111/ Louix Gorman - Rugby player profile & career statistics]</ref>

He has spent time on loan from [[Hull Kingston Rovers|Hull KR]] at [[Featherstone Rovers]] and the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]], and the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Gorman was born in [[Kingston upon Hull, East Riding of Yorkshire]], England. He is of Irish heritage.<ref>[https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-kr-starlet-earns-international-10582123 Hull KR starlet earns international call-up alongside Super League contingent]</ref><ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/extended-ireland-squad-for-wales-double-header-2025 15 Super League stars named in extended Ireland squad for Wales double-header]</ref>

He played for the Beverley Braves as a junior.<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/nextgen-meet-the-goal-kicking-jewel-in-hull-krs-academy-crown NextGen: Meet the goal-kicking jewel in Hull KR’s academy crown Rovers have tied down]</ref> Gorman was named in the England Academy squad in 2023.<ref>[https://hullkr.co.uk/news/louix-gorman-named-in-england-academy-squad-to-face-france Louix Gorman named in England Academy squad to face France.]</ref>

==Career==
Gorman joined the first team [[Hull KR]] squad ahead of the 2023 season, making his debut against the [[Wigan Warriors]] in August 2023.<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c2jjv8kz4gyo Hull KR back Gorman signs new three-year contract]</ref>

He played for [[Featherstone Rovers]] in two separate loans spells.

He spent time in 2025 on loan at the [[London Broncos]] in the [[2025 RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]].

In August 2025 Gorman was loaned out by [[Hull Kingston Rovers|Rovers]] to the [[Salford Red Devils]], during which time he played four [[Super League]] matches for [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]].
